name: Billy Assistant — Response Quality
description: Verifies near-deterministic response text for cases where the output is predictable: out-of-domain declines, clarifying questions, and ambiguous request handling. Scored with final_response_match_v2 (LLM judge, threshold 1.0).

parts.text: I want to invite a new user to my organization
To invite someone to your Billy organization, I need their email address. Could you please provide the email of the person you'd like to invite?
